settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and Inboria preferences.
settings.gmailAppPasswordDesc: Connect your Gmail in 2 minutes with an app password.
settings.gmailWizardTitle: How to get your Gmail app password
settings.gmailWizardStep1: Make sure 2-Step Verification is enabled on your Google account:
settings.gmailWizardStep3: Enter "Inboria" as the name and click "Create".
settings.gmailWizardStep4: Copy the 16-character password and paste it below.
settings.gmailWizardNote: An app password is different from your regular Google password. It only grants IMAP access to your mailbox.
settings.gmailConnectError: Gmail connection failed. Make sure 2-Step Verification is enabled and that you pasted the 16-character app password (without spaces).
settings.imapDesc: OVH, GoDaddy, Yahoo, iCloud, Free, Orange and more
settings.projectDetectionDesc: Automatically associate emails with your active projects.
settings.deleteConnectionConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this connection?
settings.noConnectionsDesc: Connect your mailbox to start receiving emails.
settings.shareWithTeamOnDesc: Your colleagues who are members can see and handle these emails.
settings.shareWithTeamOffDesc: Personal mailbox. Only you can see the emails.
settings.inboriaPrivacyDesc: Inboria remembers preferences, topics, decisions and commitments from your emails to personalise its replies. Turn memory off on a mailbox to have it ignored — for example your personal mailbox.
settings.inboriaPrivacySharedHint: Shared mailbox — affects the whole team
settings.inboriaPrivacyToastOn: Inboria memory enabled for this mailbox.
settings.inboriaPrivacyToastOff: Inboria memory disabled for this mailbox.
settings.shareConfirmPersonalDesc: The address {{email}} looks like a personal mailbox. All members of your organisation will be able to read incoming emails and reply to them. This action is meant for shared business mailboxes (support@, contact@…).
settings.unshareConfirmDesc: Members of your organisation will no longer see emails from {{email}}. Your emails remain available in your personal mailbox.
settings.shareRequiresPlan: Available on Pro and Business plans.
settings.unshareMembersNone: No other member currently has access to this mailbox.
settings.cannotDisconnectSharedDesc: This account is feeding a shared team mailbox. Turn off the "Share with team" toggle before disconnecting the account.
settings.morningBriefDesc: Inboria email summary every morning at 8 a.m.
settings.accountSignaturePlaceholder: Specific signature for this account (leave empty for no signature)
settings.disconnectedTooltip: Reconnect this account to resume synchronization.
settings.followUpDelayHint: Inboria will suggest a follow-up for emails left without a reply after this many days (1 to 60).
settings.adminOnlyToast: This page is reserved for the team admin.

hub.myAccountDesc: Profile, security, email accounts, Inboria and notifications

subscription.title: Manage your subscription
subscription.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your email volume.
subscription.paymentSuccessDesc: Your subscription has been updated successfully.
subscription.planUpdatedDesc: Your subscription has been modified successfully.
subscription.portalError: Unable to access the management portal.
subscription.quotaOverageDesc: Automatic pay-as-you-go billing. No surprises — you're notified at 80% of your monthly AI credits.
subscription.noCommitmentDesc: All plans are commitment-free. You can add or remove seats, change plans or cancel anytime from your personal space.
subscription.securityDesc: Your emails are never stored to train our models. Inboria runs in real time only. Data hosted in Europe (GDPR).
subscription.seatsExample: Example: 3 collaborators = €38.97/month — adjustable at any time from your space.
subscription.resubscribe: Resubscribe to a paid plan to continue using Inboria.
subscription.trialUsedFull: You have used your 100 free AI credits. Choose a plan below to continue.
subscription.maintenanceHint: Advanced options: recount the credit usage or restore emails flagged as junk by mistake.
subscription.cancelConfirmDesc: Your subscription will stay active until the end of the current billing period, then end without renewal. You can resubscribe at any time.
subscription.cancelSuccessDesc: Your subscription will end at the next billing date.
subscription.cancelError: Unable to cancel the subscription. Try again or contact support.

plans.trialDesc: 100 free AI credits to discover Inboria
plans.essaiDesc: 100 free AI credits to discover Inboria
plans.seatsExample: Example: 3 collaborators = €38.97/month — adjustable at any time from your space.

home.heroDesc: Inboria reads, analyzes and automatically sorts your emails according to YOUR own rules.
home.howItWorksDesc: Three simple steps to transform your email management
home.step1Desc: Simple and secure integration with your existing email in just a few clicks.
home.step2Desc: Define your own categories according to your business and specific needs.
home.step3Title: Inboria sorts your emails as they arrive
home.step3Desc: Every incoming email is analysed: priority, category, summary, unpaid invoice detection, task extraction. Your inbox is sorted in real time, you then decide what to archive or reply to.
home.trustTitle: Discover why thousands of professionals trust us
home.timeSavingDesc: Save several hours per week by automating email sorting.
home.customizationDesc: Create sorting rules tailored to your business and priorities.
home.dataSecurityDesc: Your data remains confidential and secured with end-to-end encryption.
home.clearVisionDesc: Instantly find your important emails thanks to optimal organization.
home.autopilot: Inboria sorts and prioritises your emails
home.autopilotDesc: On every incoming email, Inboria detects the priority (urgent, medium, low), suggests a category, spots unpaid invoices and extracts the actions to take. You stay in control of archiving and sending.
home.teamCollabDesc: Shared mailboxes, assignment, internal comments, real-time activity. Your team collaborates without stepping on each other.
home.multilingualDesc: Interface and AI available in French, Dutch, English, German and Spanish. Ideal for Belgian and international teams.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to save 2 hours a day?
home.ctaDesc: 100 free AI credits to discover Inboria. No credit card required.

features.heroTitle: Everything you need to take back control of your emails
features.heroDesc: Inboria sorts, summarizes and drafts replies to your emails. You review and send.
features.smartSortDesc: Artificial intelligence analyzes your email content and automatically files them in the appropriate folders to keep a clean inbox.
features.autoSummaryDesc: Save precious time by reading a concise summary generated by Inboria for long threads and endless newsletters.
features.aiDraftsDesc: With one click on an email, Inboria prepares a context-appropriate draft reply matching your usual tone. All you need to do is review and send.
features.dailyBriefDesc: Receive a clear morning recap of urgent emails, today's meetings and pending follow-ups.
features.taskExtractionDesc: On an email, ask Inboria to extract the action items — they're added to your task manager.
features.projectManagementDesc: Intelligently group all exchanges, attachments and participants related to a project in a dedicated space.
features.multiMailboxDesc: Centralize all your accounts (Gmail, Outlook, iCloud, IMAP) in a single, unified and frictionless interface.
features.emailSignatureDesc: Create, manage and deploy dynamic, harmonized professional signatures for yourself or your entire team.
features.smartArchiveDesc: Proactive inbox cleanup: read newsletters and obsolete notifications are archived or deleted according to your rules.
features.priorityDetectionDesc: Never miss what matters. Emails from your important clients or containing urgencies are instantly highlighted.
features.mobileAppDesc: Stay productive on the go with our iOS and Android app optimized for quick and efficient consultation.
features.securityDesc: Your data is protected by end-to-end encryption. We strictly comply with GDPR and never sell your information.
features.ctaTitle: Ready to save 2 hours a day?
features.ctaDesc: 100 free AI credits to discover Inboria. No credit card required.
features.snoozeScheduleDesc: Snooze an email for later or schedule sending at the perfect date and time. Your inbox stays focused on what matters now.
features.aiFollowupsDesc: Inboria spots emails left unanswered and offers you a ready-to-send follow-up. No more missed opportunities.
features.agendaDesc: View your meetings and time-slot proposals right inside Inboria, synced with your calendar.
features.sharedMailboxesDesc: Manage your contact@, support@ or billing@ addresses as a team. Every member can see, claim and handle incoming emails.
features.teamWorkDesc: Email assignment, private internal comments, colleague mentions. No more endless forwards or "did you see this email?" pings.
features.realtimeNotificationsDesc: Notification bell, unread badge, assignment alerts. Stay informed without switching screens.
features.multilingualDesc: Available in French, English, Dutch, German and Spanish. Every team member works in their own language.
features.autopilotModeDesc: Inboria processes every incoming email: priority, category, summary, unpaid invoice detection, task extraction. You then decide what to archive, delete or reply to.

pricing.heroDesc: Choose the plan that fits your needs. Change or cancel anytime.

classification.heroTitle: Pre-configured or AI-generated industry packs to organize your emails in one click
classification.heroDesc: Inboria offers pre-configured category packs for every profession. Lawyer, doctor, restaurateur, e-commerce... Apply yours and let Inboria sort your emails automatically.
classification.familiesTitle: Industry packs organized into 9 sector families
classification.familiesDesc: Each pack contains 6 to 12 categories optimized for your business.
classification.familiesReassurance: Votre activité ne figure pas dans les exemples ci-dessous ? L'IA d'Inboria conçoit en quelques secondes un pack de catégories propre à votre métier — sans limite de famille ou de secteur.
classification.notListedTitle: Votre métier mérite son propre référentiel
classification.notListedDesc: Décrivez votre activité en quelques phrases. L'IA génère un pack de catégories fidèle au vocabulaire, aux interlocuteurs et aux processus de votre secteur. Aucune activité n'est trop spécifique.
classification.professionalServicesDesc: Lawyers, accountants, notaries, consultants, architects, brokers... Categories adapted to legal, financial and advisory exchanges.
classification.healthDesc: Doctors, dentists, physiotherapists, pharmacists, vets, psychologists. Appointment management, prescriptions, labs and insurance.
classification.commerceDesc: Shops, e-commerce, wholesalers, florists, wine merchants. Orders, suppliers, logistics and daily customer relations.
classification.realEstateDesc: Real estate agencies, building managers, construction companies, property developers. Mandates, visits, sites, quotes and tenders.
classification.businessServicesDesc: Marketing agencies, HR firms, engineering offices, IT companies, chartered accountants. Projects, reporting, invoicing and client collaboration.
classification.craftsDesc: Electricians, plumbers, carpenters, mechanics, landscapers. Quotes, interventions, after-sales and subcontractor management.
classification.educationDesc: Private schools, training centres, coaches, driving schools. Registrations, schedules, certifications and parent/student communication.
classification.hospitalityDesc: Restaurants, hotels, caterers, travel agencies, guesthouses. Reservations, suppliers, events and customer reviews.
classification.otherServicesDesc: Associations, content creators, fashion, transport, cleaning, beauty salons... All businesses that don't fit in a single category.
classification.advantagesDesc: A system designed so that every email lands in the right place, effortlessly.
classification.operational30sDesc: No need to create your categories one by one. A pre-configured industry pack saves you hours of setup.
classification.operational30sH1: Ready-to-use packs for the most common professions
classification.customAIDesc: Your profession isn't in the list? Describe your business and Inboria generates a perfectly tailored category pack.
classification.customAIH3: Name and description for each category
classification.mergeNoOverwriteDesc: Applying a pack never erases your existing categories. Duplicates are automatically detected and ignored.
classification.intuitiveSearchDesc: Instantly find the ideal pack with keyword search and collapsible sector families.
classification.howItWorksDesc: From choosing the pack to full automation, in 4 simple steps.
classification.step1Desc: Browse the 9 sector families and find the pack that matches your business.
classification.step2Desc: In one click, the pack's categories are added to your account without overwriting your existing ones.
classification.step3Desc: Inboria uses your categories to automatically sort every incoming email into the right folder.
classification.step4Desc: Add, modify or delete categories. Generate a custom AI pack if your profession is unique.
classification.ctaDesc: Choose your industry pack, apply it, and let Inboria sort your emails automatically. It's that simple.
classification.ctaFooter: 100 free AI credits to try • No credit card required

ai.heroDesc: Inboria understands your inbox: she remembers your contacts, sorts your emails by importance and drafts your replies. You keep the final say on what you send, archive or delete.
ai.whatAIDoes: What Inboria does for you, every day
ai.whatAIDoesDesc: Seven built-in skills that transform your relationship with email.
ai.memoryDesc: Inboria remembers every contact: what you promised, who's waiting on a reply, the context of a project. No commitment forgotten, no email lands without context.
ai.memoryH1: Facts, episodes and signals per contact
ai.autoSortDesc: Each incoming email is analyzed by Inboria: subject, sender, context, urgency. Strategic emails rise to the top. Newsletters and notifications stay quiet.
ai.smartSummariesDesc: Long threads, endless newsletters and complex exchanges are summarized in a few lines. You get the gist without reading everything.
ai.aiDraftsDesc: With one click, Inboria prepares a relevant reply in your tone, drawing on the contact's history. You review, you validate, you send.
ai.dailyBriefDesc: Every morning, Inboria sends you a clear recap: urgencies, today's meetings, pending follow-ups, extracted tasks. You start the day with a complete picture.
ai.priorityDetectionDesc: Inboria identifies urgent emails, key client requests and messages requiring quick action. They are surfaced in your inbox.
ai.aiPacksDesc: Your industry isn't in our preset packs? Describe your business and Inboria generates a custom category pack tailored to your sector.
ai.howAIWorksDesc: From the email received to the validated action, in 4 transparent steps.
ai.step1Desc: An email lands in your Inboria inbox.
ai.step2Desc: Inboria analyzes the content, sender, subject and context in under 3 seconds.
ai.step3Desc: The email is sorted and summarized. You can also ask Inboria for a draft reply in one click.
ai.step4Desc: You find everything organized. One click to validate Inboria's suggestions.
ai.assistantSubtitle: Inboria's colleague who answers your questions about the app
ai.assistantDesc: Inboria Assistant is Inboria's colleague: he answers your questions about how the app works. 'How do I create a category?', 'Where do I see my remaining credits?', 'Why is this email flagged urgent?'. Available 24/7 in the corner of your dashboard.
ai.assistantH3: Context-aware of your plan and settings
ai.assistantH4: Available in French, English, Dutch, German and Spanish
ai.securityDesc: We take protecting your data as seriously as Inboria's performance.
ai.transparencyDesc: Every Inboria action is visible and explainable. You see why an email was sorted into a category and can always correct it.
ai.yourDataDesc: No email is used to train models. Your data is processed in real time and never stored by external providers.
ai.gdprCompliantDesc: Inboria strictly follows the General Data Protection Regulation. Hosted in Europe, encrypted, with guaranteed right to deletion.
ai.secureInfraDesc: Encryption in transit and at rest. Strong authentication. No sensitive data is ever exposed in logs or responses.
ai.faq1q: Does Inboria really read all my emails?
ai.faq1a: Inboria analyzes your emails only to sort them, summarize them and prepare replies. No email is stored by external providers or used to train models. Processing is ephemeral and in real time.
ai.faq2a: Yes, every Inboria skill (sorting, summaries, drafts, memory) can be disabled individually in your settings. You always keep full control.
ai.faq3a: Absolutely. Inboria is built for SMEs across Belgium, France and beyond. It understands and replies in French, Dutch, German, English and Spanish.
ai.faq4q: Does Inboria sometimes get it wrong?
ai.faq4a: Like any intelligence, errors are possible. That's why every suggestion is shown for validation. You correct in one click and Inboria learns from your corrections.
ai.faq5a: Inboria relies on the latest generation of language models, recognized for reliability in natural-language processing. We continuously select and optimize the best available models to guarantee quality results.
ai.ctaTitle: Adopt Inboria. Inboria understands your inbox.
ai.ctaDesc: Join the SMEs that save 2 hours a day thanks to Inboria.
ai.ctaFooter: 100 free AI credits • No credit card required • Inboria included in every plan

inboriaChat.heroTitle: Chat with Inboria. Ask anything about your emails.
inboriaChat.heroDesc: Inboria knows your contacts, your commitments and the history of your exchanges. Ask anything in your own language, just like you would a teammate.
inboriaChat.knowsDesc: Not a generic assistant. A teammate that has your inbox in memory.
inboriaChat.knows1Desc: Who they are, when you last spoke, what you decided together.
inboriaChat.knows2Desc: What you promised, what people expect from you, deadlines in progress.
inboriaChat.knows3Desc: Your tone, your habits, the topics you want to be alerted on.
inboriaChat.knows4Desc: Threads, classifications, notes — everything stays one question away.
inboriaChat.askDesc: A few real examples of what your teammates ask the chat every day.
inboriaChat.ask1: What did I commit to this week?
inboriaChat.ask2: Who should I follow up with first?
inboriaChat.ask3: Summarize what I know about my latest client.
inboriaChat.ask4: Did I reply to Sophie about the quote from the 14th?
inboriaChat.ask5: What did we decide on the Atlas project?
inboriaChat.ask6: How many emails are still waiting for my reply?
inboriaChat.step1Desc: One button in the corner of your inbox. Available from any page of the dashboard.
inboriaChat.step2Desc: In plain English, like you would a teammate. Inboria understands open questions.
inboriaChat.step3Desc: Your emails, contacts and commitments — never anywhere else. Emails marked as private stay excluded.
inboriaChat.step4Desc: A summary in a few seconds, with sources if you want to verify.
inboriaChat.privacyDesc: You stay in control of what Inboria sees and keeps in memory.
inboriaChat.privacy1: Inboria only reads what you can see
inboriaChat.privacy1Desc: If you cannot see an email, Inboria cannot either. No exception.
inboriaChat.privacy2Desc: Mark an exchange as private: it becomes invisible to the chat, even on the admin side.
inboriaChat.privacy3: No data sent to third parties
inboriaChat.privacy3Desc: Your exchanges with Inboria are never used to train an external model.
inboriaChat.privacy4Desc: European hosting, audit log, right to erasure at any time.
inboriaChat.faq1q: What exactly is the Inboria chat?
inboriaChat.faq1a: A conversational teammate built into your Inboria dashboard. You speak to it in natural language; it answers based on your emails, contacts and commitments.
inboriaChat.faq2q: Can Inboria answer about all my emails?
inboriaChat.faq2a: About every email you can see in your inbox. Emails you mark as private are excluded, even if an admin in your organisation asks the question.
inboriaChat.faq3q: How does Inboria learn my commitments?
inboriaChat.faq3a: Across exchanges, Inboria identifies promises ("I'll send that to you Monday"), deadlines and expectations. You can always correct or delete a memory.
inboriaChat.faq4q: Is the chat available in multiple languages?
inboriaChat.faq4a: Yes: French, English, Dutch, German and Spanish. Inboria replies in the language of your interface.
inboriaChat.faq5q: Are my conversations with Inboria stored?
inboriaChat.faq5a: The thread stays accessible for the duration of your session. You can clear it at any time using the "Clear" button in the chat.
inboriaChat.ctaTitle: Give your inbox a teammate that knows it by heart
inboriaChat.ctaDesc: Activate the Inboria chat in a few seconds.
inboriaChat.ctaFooter: No credit card. Cancel in one click.

crm.heroTitle: Your CRM and your emails, finally in sync
crm.heroDesc: Inboria connects HubSpot, Pipedrive, Salesforce and Odoo to your inbox. Your contacts, deals and opportunities sync automatically — no double entry, ever.
crm.whatItDoes: What Inboria does with your CRM
crm.whatItDoesDesc: Native integration with the 4 leading CRMs on the market. One-click connection (or API key for Odoo), automatic sync, and every email enriched with the related contact and deal info.
crm.hubspotDesc: Native HubSpot sync. Your contacts and deals appear automatically in Inboria. When an email arrives, you instantly see which contact it's linked to and which deals are open with that person.
crm.pipedriveDesc: Full Pipedrive integration. Persons, deals and organizations sync both ways. Your sales reps stop juggling between inbox and CRM.
crm.salesforceDesc: Connect your Salesforce in seconds. Inboria syncs contacts, accounts and opportunities. For mid-market and enterprise, a Sandbox toggle lets you test safely before going to Production.
crm.salesforceH3: Switch Sandbox / Production in one click
crm.odooDesc: Connect your Odoo instance (Community or Enterprise). Inboria syncs contacts (res.partner) and opportunities (crm.lead). Authentication via URL + database + login + API key — no OAuth, your key can be revoked any time in Odoo.
crm.autoSyncDesc: Inboria syncs your CRM every 15 minutes in the background. New contacts added in Inboria flow back to the CRM, and CRM-side changes are reflected in Inboria. You can also force a sync any time.
crm.secureOauthDesc: Inboria uses OAuth exclusively to connect to your CRM. No password is stored. You can revoke access at any time from your CRM or from Inboria. All exchanges are encrypted.
crm.howItWorksDesc: Connect your CRM in 4 steps, no technical setup needed.
crm.step1Desc: In Settings > CRM, pick your CRM and click Connect. Inboria redirects you to the CRM's secure login page.
crm.step2Desc: Sign in to your CRM and authorize Inboria to access your contacts and deals. It's OAuth — never your password.
crm.step3Desc: Inboria imports your existing contacts and deals. A few seconds to a few minutes depending on the size of your database.
crm.step4Desc: Every 15 minutes, Inboria refreshes contacts, deals and associations. You can also force a sync at any time.
crm.securityDesc: Your CRM data is precious. Here's how Inboria protects it.
crm.transparencyDesc: You see exactly which data is synced and when. The last-sync timestamp is shown for each connected CRM.
crm.noLockInDesc: Your CRM stays the single source of truth. Inboria only stores the minimal references needed (ID, name, email). You can disconnect any time without losing data.
crm.gdprCompliantDesc: Inboria strictly complies with the GDPR. European hosting, encryption, and guaranteed right to erasure.
crm.secureInfraDesc: All CRM connections go through OAuth. No password is ever stored. Tokens are encrypted at rest and revocable at any time.
crm.faq1a: HubSpot, Pipedrive, Salesforce and Odoo. For Salesforce, you can switch between Sandbox (test environment) and Production with a simple toggle at connection time. For Odoo, you provide your instance URL (Online or self-hosted) when connecting.
crm.faq2a: No. Inboria only stores the minimal references needed (ID, name, email) to link your emails to your CRM. Your CRM remains the single source of truth.
crm.faq3q: How often does the sync run?
crm.faq3a: Every 15 minutes automatically. You can also click 'Sync now' from Settings > CRM to force an immediate refresh.
crm.faq4q: Can I connect several CRMs at the same time?
crm.faq4a: Yes. If your SMB uses, for example, HubSpot for marketing and Salesforce for sales, you can connect both in parallel. Each email is enriched with information from every connected CRM.
crm.faq5q: How do I disconnect a CRM?
crm.faq5a: At any time, in Settings > CRM, click 'Disconnect'. Sync stops immediately and access tokens are revoked. Your data inside Inboria stays available, and your CRM is not modified.
crm.trademarkNotice: HubSpot, Pipedrive, Salesforce and Odoo are trademarks of their respective owners. Inboria is not affiliated with any of these companies; the names are mentioned solely to describe the interoperability of our service with these products.
crm.ctaDesc: Try Inboria for free and connect your CRM in less than a minute.

enterprise.heroDesc: Inboria combines email intelligence and team collaboration for effortless email management. Inboria sorts, summarizes and prepares your replies while your team collaborates via shared mailboxes, assignments and internal comments.
enterprise.collaborateDesc: Tools designed for SMEs who want to structure their email management without complexity.
enterprise.aiTeam: Artificial intelligence at the team's service
enterprise.aiTeamDesc: Inboria works for your entire team: it automatically sorts incoming emails, generates instant summaries and detects priorities. On request, it prepares a draft reply in one click. Whether in your personal or shared mailboxes, every email is analyzed and categorized before you even open your inbox.
enterprise.centralOrgDesc: Create your organization in one click and bring your whole team under one roof. Each collaborator has their own access while sharing common resources.
enterprise.rolesPermissionsDesc: Structure your team with clear roles. Administrators manage members and settings, while members focus on their work.
enterprise.sharedMailboxesDesc: Create shared inboxes for your generic addresses (contact@, support@, billing@). Every team member can view, claim and handle incoming emails.
enterprise.internalNotesDesc: Collaborate directly on emails by adding private comments visible only to your team. No more unnecessary forwards and "did you see this email?" pings.
enterprise.internalNotesH3: Edit and delete your own notes
enterprise.smartAssignmentDesc: Distribute work efficiently by assigning each email to the right collaborator. The assignee receives a notification and finds their assigned emails in a dedicated view.
enterprise.realTimeNotifsDesc: Never miss anything: every assignment or comment triggers an instant notification. The bell in your sidebar keeps you informed without leaving your inbox.
enterprise.activityDashboardDesc: Track your team's performance at a glance: emails assigned, handled, commented. A chronological activity feed shows you who's doing what, in real-time.
enterprise.workflowDesc: From creating your organization to daily collaboration.
enterprise.wStep1Desc: Name your company and activate the Business plan.
enterprise.wStep2Desc: Send email invitations. They join in one click.
enterprise.wStep3Desc: Create your shared addresses and add the relevant members.
enterprise.wStep4Desc: Assign, comment, track activity. Inboria keeps the full history in sync.
enterprise.ctaTitle: Ready to transform your team's email management?
enterprise.ctaDesc: Join the Belgian and French SMEs that have already adopted Inboria for smoother collaboration and tenfold productivity.
enterprise.ctaFooter: Business plan from €38.97/month (3 seats at €12.99/seat) • Scalable up to 50 seats • 2-minute setup
enterprise.faq1q: How many members can I add to my team?
enterprise.faq1a: The Business plan includes base seats, and you can add as many as needed directly from your subscription portal. There is no imposed limit.
enterprise.faq2q: Do my collaborators have access to all my emails?
enterprise.faq2a: No, each member keeps their private emails. Only shared mailbox emails and explicitly assigned emails are visible to the team.
enterprise.faq3q: Are internal comments visible to the email sender?
enterprise.faq3a: Absolutely not. Comments are strictly internal to your organization. The original sender never knows about them.
enterprise.faq4q: Can I upgrade from Solo to Business plan?
enterprise.faq4a: Yes, the upgrade is instant from the Subscription page of your dashboard. Your data and settings are preserved.
enterprise.faq5q: Does Inboria also work on shared mailboxes?
enterprise.faq5a: Yes, the artificial intelligence sorts, summarizes and categorizes all emails, including those from shared mailboxes, in the same way as for your personal emails.

legal.dataCollectedIntro: As part of using our services, we collect the following data:
legal.dataContent: Email content processed by our AI service
legal.dataUsageIntro: Your personal data is used exclusively for the following purposes:
legal.dataUsageAI: Operation of the Inboria sorting and analysis service
legal.dataUsageImprovement: Continuous improvement of our service and algorithms
legal.retentionActive: Your data remains active and is retained as long as your account exists on our platform.
legal.retentionDeletion: All your personal data and email content are permanently deleted 30 days after account termination.
legal.gdprRightsIntro: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
legal.rightAccessDesc: You can request to view the data we hold about you.
legal.rightRectificationDesc: You can request the correction of inaccurate data.
legal.rightErasureDesc: You can demand the deletion of your personal data.
legal.rightPortabilityDesc: You can retrieve your data in a structured and readable format.
legal.exerciseRights: To exercise these rights, please contact us at
legal.serviceDescText: Inboria is an AI-powered email sorting and management service. The service allows users to connect their existing inboxes to automate the sorting, categorization and prioritization of incoming messages.
legal.accountAccessText1: Access to the service requires creating a user account. When creating this account, the user commits to providing accurate and up-to-date information.
legal.accountAccessText2: The user is solely responsible for the confidentiality of their login credentials and all activities performed under their account. In case of unauthorized use, the user must immediately notify the publisher.
legal.userObligationsIntro: The user agrees to use the service in compliance with applicable laws and these terms.
legal.userObl1: Use the service to send junk mail or unsolicited communications.
legal.userObl2: Transmit illegal, defamatory content, or content infringing third-party rights.
legal.userObl3: Attempt to circumvent security measures or disrupt the service's operation.
legal.liabilityText1: The publisher strives to keep the service accessible and operational but does not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation.
legal.liabilityText2: To the extent permitted by law, the publisher disclaims any liability for indirect damages, data loss, or business losses resulting from the use or inability to use the service.
legal.ipText1: All elements making up the Inboria service (software, interfaces, algorithms, texts, images) are the exclusive property of the publisher and are protected by intellectual property laws.
legal.ipText2: The user retains full ownership of data and content (emails) submitted to the service. They grant the publisher a limited license solely for the purpose of providing the Inboria sorting service.
legal.terminationText1: The user can terminate their account at any time from the settings of their personal space.
legal.terminationText2: The publisher reserves the right to suspend or terminate an account in case of violation of these terms of use. Upon termination, user data will be deleted in accordance with our Privacy Policy.
legal.jurisdictionText: These terms of use are governed by Belgian law. In case of dispute regarding the interpretation or execution of these terms, the courts of Brussels shall have sole jurisdiction.
legal.betaPlaceholder: Service in closed private beta. Legal information (company name, registered office, business number) will be published once the publishing company is officially incorporated.

sharedMailboxes.shareConnectionDesc: Link an existing email connection to this shared mailbox.
sharedMailboxes.noMailboxesDesc: Create a shared mailbox to centralize your team's emails.
sharedMailboxes.deleteConfirmDesc: Associated emails will no longer be accessible through this mailbox.
sharedMailboxes.shareTitle: Share an address with the team
sharedMailboxes.shareDesc: Select a connected address from your Settings to share it with your team members.
sharedMailboxes.noConnectionsDesc: No email address connected. Connect an address in Settings first to share it.
sharedMailboxes.allShared: All your connected addresses are already shared.
sharedMailboxes.shareToStart: To share an address, enable “Share with team” from Settings › My account.
sharedMailboxes.deleteConfirmDescDetailed: Your teammates will lose access to this mailbox's emails. The personal mailbox remains intact and sharing can be re-enabled at any time from My account.
sharedMailboxes.allTeammatesAlready: All your teammates are already members of this mailbox. To add a new one, invite them to the team first.
sharedMailboxes.noTeammatesYet: You don't have any teammates yet. Invite someone to your team to be able to add them to shared mailboxes.

manual.title: User guide
manual.subtitle: Discover all the features of Inboria
manual.businessUpgradeDesc: Upgrade to Business plan to unlock team management, shared mailboxes and activity tracking.

sections.receptionDesc: Your smart inbox. All emails are automatically sorted by priority (urgent, medium, low) and classified by category using AI.
receptionFeatures: Auto-sort by priority with color coding
AI summary of each email in one sentence
Auto sync (every 5 min) with Gmail, Outlook and IMAP
Pagination: batch loading of 50 emails for smooth navigation
Multi-select to archive, delete or mark as read
Assign emails to a colleague (Business plan)
Shared mailboxes tab to view and handle team emails
Email simulator to test AI sorting
New message: compose and send directly
sections.attachmentsDesc: Manage attachments for incoming and outgoing emails. View, download and attach files easily.
attachmentsFeatures: Auto-detection of attachments on reception (Gmail and IMAP)
Visual indicator (paperclip + counter) on emails with attachments
Inline image preview directly in the email
PDFs open in a new tab
Attach files when sending or replying (Attach button)
Up to 10 files per email, 10 MB max per file
Individual removal of attached files before sending
sections.sentDesc: Find all your sent emails and replies. View full conversations with exchange history.
sentFeatures: List of all sent emails and replies
Visual distinction between new messages and replies
Conversation view: full exchange history in one place
Access to AI summary of each email
sections.archivesDesc: Find all your archived emails. An archived email no longer appears in Inbox but remains accessible at any time.
archivesFeatures: Unarchive an email to return it to Inbox
Full detail of each archived email
sections.followupDesc: Centralize your reminders and follow-ups. AI automatically detects unanswered emails that need a follow-up so nothing slips through the cracks.
followupFeatures: List of all your active and completed follow-ups
Automatic AI detection of follow-ups from your conversations
Manual creation of a follow-up with due date and notes
Direct link to the source email and full conversation
Quick reply or AI draft from the follow-up card
Mark as done or delete a follow-up
sections.briefDesc: A daily summary of your email activity. View your inbox status and trends at a glance.
sections.agendaDesc: Your built-in calendar with automatic appointment detection from your emails. Manage appointments, meetings and events.
agendaFeatures: Automatic appointment detection by AI from your emails
Link an appointment to a project
Link to the source email of the appointment
sections.tasksDesc: Manage tasks you create yourself or extract from an email on demand. Inboria suggests the title, you track progress.
tasksFeatures: Tasks generated by Inboria on demand from your emails
Direct link to source email for each task
AI filter to view only Inboria-generated tasks
Count badges on each filter (All, To do, Done, AI)
Reply directly to the source email from a task
sections.projectsDesc: Group your emails by project to better organize your work. Create projects and associate emails.
projectsFeatures: Associate an email with a project from Inbox
View all project emails in one click
sections.classificationDesc: Manage your email categories. AI auto-creates relevant categories, but you can customize them. Choose from 50 pre-built industry packs.
classificationFeatures: List of all your categories with counters
50 pre-built industry packs (accounting, real estate, legal, e-commerce...)
AI learns from your corrections to improve
sections.notificationsDesc: Stay informed of important activity. Notifications alert you to urgent emails, assignments and team actions.
notificationsFeatures: Mark a notification as read or mark all as read
sections.settingsDesc: Configure your account, connect your email accounts and customize your preferences.
settingsFeatures: Edit your name, language and email signature
Connect multiple email accounts (Gmail, Outlook, IMAP)
Connect multiple accounts from the same provider
Set custom AI rules (priority/category by sender)
sections.categoriesDesc: Dedicated view for fine-grained category management. Personalize labels, keywords and icons so Inboria sorts your emails your way.
categoriesFeatures: List of all your active categories with email counters
Create a category with name, description and keywords
Quick edit or delete a category
AI suggestions based on your email history
Keywords to help AI automatically recognize emails
sections.subscriptionDesc: Manage your Inboria subscription plan. Compare offers and upgrade.
subscriptionFeatures: Free trial of 100 AI credits included
View your quota and current consumption
sections.teamDesc: Manage your organization members. Invite colleagues, assign roles and collaborate on emails.
teamFeatures: Roles: admin (full management) and member (limited access)
Remove a member from the organization
Create your organization if it doesn't exist yet
sections.sharedMailboxesDesc: Share email accounts with your team. Admin shares an existing email connection, members can view and handle emails.
sharedMailboxesFeatures: Admin shares one of their email connections as a shared mailbox
Add or remove members from a shared mailbox
Members see shared emails in Inbox > Shared mailboxes tab
Claim an email to indicate you're handling it
sections.teamActivityDesc: Track your team's activity in real time. See who's doing what and follow important actions.
teamActivityFeatures: View each member's actions (emails read, archived, assigned...)
Filter by member or action type

privacy.title: Privacy & team access
privacy.subtitle: Your emails stay yours. Your organisation's admins can open a per-contact "team folder" (useful when someone's away or has left). You can see here when it happens and hide any email at any time.
privacy.howTitle: What your admins can — and can't — see
privacy.how1: Your admins can open a contact folder in "team view" and see the organisation's exchanges with that contact (service continuity).
privacy.how2: Emails you mark as "private" are automatically hidden in the team view and from Inboria on the admin side.
privacy.how3: Every admin access is logged and appears below. The log is immutable.
privacy.privateEmpty: No emails marked private yet. You can mark one from its email card ("Mark private" button).
privacy.logTitle: Log of admin accesses involving you
privacy.logEmpty: No admin access involving you so far.
privacy.unmarkedDesc: This email is visible to your admins again (team folder view + Inboria).

action.viewInboriaTeam: {{who}} asked Inboria a question in team mode — {{n}} email(s) read

privacy.orgLogSubtitle: As an administrator, you see here every team-view consultation made by all admins in your organisation, with the admin and the impacted teammate.
privacy.orgLogEmpty: No admin consultation recorded in your organisation yet.
